title: NGE Ep24 Script First and Second Drafts
display_title: NGE Ep24 Script First and Second Drafts
wikitext:
[]: NGE Ep.24 Script First and Second Drafts             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Sep 19, 2009 1:25 pm BL magazine JUNE has published a variety of articles related to NGE - from interviews to Director Anno to scrapped scripts. In particular, according to several different sources, the JUNE Supplement 09/1996 issue (『別冊JUNE』1996年9月号) published the scrapped First and Second Drafts of the script for episode 24, "The Last Messenger". These scripts are credited, according to the source below, to Satsukawa Akio ( 薩川昭夫 ), a scriptwriter involved with Nadia, NGE and Love & Pop . So far IIRC I've taken a look at the First draft and bits of the Second draft, and the differences with the final scenario seem glaring enough to make them worth a fan's time, IMHO (especially - but NOT exclusively - if you're a fan of Kaworu and/or Shinji and/or KawoShin) . In other words, I thought these resources were worth sharing as an insight into the creative process that brought us Evangelion and continues on to this day with Rebuild. You might also notice similarities with Sadamoto's manga version. This website (Japanese text only) has a variety of resources, including the mysterious scrapped Ep. 25' and 26' screenplays and the aforementioned Ep. 24 scripts. Link to Script for Ep. 24 First Draft - JPN Text Only  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Sep 19, 2009 1:52 pm Psst, I think you meant "http" in your links.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 1:53 pm Very cool find! Is there a link to the Anno interview from that magazine anywhere? I'd be interested in seeing it.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sat Sep 19, 2009 2:11 pm Legendary wrote: Psst, I think you meant "http" in your links.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 19, 2009 7:57 pm LiLi wrote: It seemed a pity not to share... ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 8:51 pm I skimmed through the first draft using google translate, hopefully I'll have time to look at the second one tomorrow. Clearly this was early in the planning stages considering.... ~Shinji meets Kaworu playing the piano like in the manga, but it's at school. ~Asuka(!!) is okay and well, she and Shinji have a fight at one point in his room. ~Toji is discharged from the hospital, Kensuke invites Shinji to Toji getting released but Shinji wants to see Kaworu instead. A scene that's really cute is how Kaworu would have helped Shinji learn how to swim. If nothing else, I think this should have been kept: Suddenly shedding tears, Shinji buries his face in Kaworu's shoulder, crying for no reason

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:14 pm Via SSD, Kaworu is in "A God Am I" mode. Rei: "You are an Angel." Kaworu: "An Angel? *laugh* I am God."

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:34 pm From #egf-rpg's discussion of why some awesome lines and scenes were scrapped in the final: <Legendary> in Japan, a large amount of the budget is spent on an awesomeness quotient <Legendary> when they scripted 24, they weren't expecting to be bankrupted by 19 <Legendary> so they still had lots of money for awesome <Legendary> and then that money ran out <NAveryW> The eariest script for episode 24 had dancing elephants and a pyrotechnics sequence <NAveryW> That was the first thing to go

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:36 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ~Toji is discharged from the hospital, Kensuke invites Shinji to Toji getting released but Shinji wants to see Kaworu instead. A scene that's really cute is how Kaworu would have helped Shinji learn how to swim. If nothing else, I think this should have been kept:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:56 pm Okay so I didn't have time to check but I think the Take 2 episode 24 bathtub scene implies Shinji gets hard. What really made me go is THIS, on page 4 of the take 2 episode: Google translate wrote: Close to the face of Kaworu Shinji's face to a smooth stop. カヲル、シンジと口づけを交わす。 Kaworu, Shinji, and share a kiss. シンジ、拒むことなく、自然に受け入れる自分に気づく。 Shinji, without refuse, to accept his notice nature. 妙に冷静な気持ちになって、天井の明りを見ている。 It felt strangely calm,

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Sep 19, 2009 9:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Okay so I didn't have time to check but I think the Take 2 episode 24 bathtub scene implies Shinji gets hard.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 19, 2009 10:20 pm Same with an A/S kiss and a K/S kiss... Nice parallels of real (Asuka as well as reality) vs ideal (Kaworu as well as Instrumentality) there. FFFFUUU-- I'm now dying to see where Anno takes the character dynamics with the rest of Webuild. Be out sooner, Q (and 4.0)!!

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sun Sep 20, 2009 1:19 am I really do wonder how the audience would have taken this rather open version I'm sure that turning what was wrapped as a mecha/shonen show into yaoi would have been a rather funny way of trolling... he'd probably get a few angry notes that way. Sailor Star Dust wrote: I admit, seeing an anime Kaworu/Shinji kiss would have been cute in a way (This scene would have beaten the hell out of what Sadamoto gives us in the manga! ). Though while Shinji obviously has sexual confusion around Kaworu, I don't think he felt the same way around Kaworu that he clearly feels for, say, Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:06 am MWAHAHAHAHA! I'm glad you guys got to the juicy parts - had I brought them up, they might have been taken for the ravings of a KawoShin fangirl... ;) Ahem. :PARTIAL SUMMARY EDITED WITH SOME MORE DETAILS: Synapsid wrote: I'm glad you did, I’m really glad that you’ve gone through the trouble to find all of this and share it with us, it really does give out a much better look at the thought behind Kaworu’s design, these scripts and the magazine sources you gave us really are going to fill in some of the gaps, thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:46 am Asuka even goes to Shinji's room to cheer him up in her own way, but the miserable puppy doesn't want any of that and even tells her not to touch him.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:50 am Mr. Tines wrote: Asuka even goes to Shinji's room to cheer him up in her own way, but the miserable puppy doesn't want any of that and even tells her not to touch him.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Sep 20, 2009 3:56 am Just a short notice to say, I edited the post above with a bit more details... ;) @tines: It's also interesting to note that Asuka doesn't seem jealous in the First Draft, as far as I can tell. The one who gets accused of being jealous by Ritsuko is... Misato (darn, I forgot to mention it!?) Ritsuko tells Misato, IIRC, that she's jealous of Kaworu cause she's afraid he might take Shinji away.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:00 am esselfortium wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: Asuka even goes to Shinji's room to cheer him up in her own way, but the miserable puppy doesn't want any of that and even tells her not to touch him.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:06 am esselfortium wrote: In the show that was actually released

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Sep 20, 2009 4:08 am Guys... I looked again at the scene, so I can give you a little summary. So Asuka goes to Shinji's room, basically telling him she doesn't know what happened (liar...) but he needs to snap out of it cause his behavior is shameful. Shinji doesn't reply, so she pokes his face with a finger, going, Will you at least answer me. Shinji. Shin-chan. Shinji, unkindly brushing off Asuka's hand, goes, don't touch me with your filthy hands. Asuka is silent. Shinji goes, how dare you, after you spread that filthy rumor. I don't want to see your face, Get out. Asuka flees the room in a rage.
